ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface the stadium has */,
  "year_opened" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was opened */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the stadium */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about accessibility features */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "historical_usage" TEXT /* Summary of historical usage data */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating based on past performance and user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "stadium_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., sports, concert) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the event (e.g., booked, available) */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planned, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_stadium_code FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_code") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., event planner, admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "role_details" TEXT /* Detailed role description */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for event types and venues */,
  "user_history" TEXT /* History of user activities and bookings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "number_of_tickets" INTEGER /* Number of tickets booked for the event */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the booking */,
  "booking_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which the ticket is issued */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number for the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., sold, available) */,
  "row" TEXT /* Row number for the ticket */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section number for the ticket */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was sold */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the ticket was sold (e.g., online, box office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, maintenance) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the staff member */,
  "stadium_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium managed by the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "shift_schedule" TEXT /* Shift schedule for the staff member */,
  "training_certifications" TEXT /* List of training and certifications */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating based on performance and user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_stadium_code FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_code") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking related to the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if applicable */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for refund, if applicable */,
  "dispute_status" TEXT /* Status of any payment disputes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_context" TEXT /* Context in which the feedback was provided (e.g., pre-event, post-event) */,
  "user_rating_venue" INTEGER /* User rating for the venue */,
  "user_rating_event" INTEGER /* User rating for the event */,
  "user_rating_staff" INTEGER /* User rating for the staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Sports, Concert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., Sports, Entertainment) */,
  "subcategories" TEXT /* Subcategories of the event type (e.g., Football, Basketball) */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on past events and user interest */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Trends and insights related to the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
